State.Author: Astronaut In Orbit and Babscoole
State.Description: Planetary trading posts rework inspired by JJs Trade Post Revamp. Different design for each race. Each trade station has 8 sleek black landing pads and pad-to-station glass protected corridors. The indoor area includes automatic doors, trade terminal, a ship salvager, a character customizer, shield and health stations and a save point.

Increases the living ship's speed and maneuverability to a bit below a fighter ship.

Allows to install the Teleport Receiver and Economy -and Conflict scanners on the living ship.

State.Author: AndiPro66 aka UserPro66
State.Description: Update NMS 6.12+. This mod displays nearly instantly all comunication & dialog text messages. All languages supported. Use left mouse click to accelerate even the interactivity dialog. Update for NMS-Voyagers / Expedition 20: Breach 6.12 + latest Experimental (Developer) branch. No more need of crazy mouse clicking!
State.Name: Fast Text View

State.Description: Fixes the Vile Brood icon on system details using the whispering egg icon, as well as the Salvageable Scrap icon using the Buried Technology Module icon.
State.Name: Vile Brood Salvageable Scrap Icon Fix

State.Author: Ketaros
State.Description: Several items in the game have their icons image duplicated and some other different versions with the very same icon. This mod fixes 21 of those cases, adding new icons variations to the game at this version. This mod is 100% cosmetics/visual, I don't touch in a single stat, function or parameter how the game works.

Original.Name: Reduced Ship Launch Fuel Costs (Or Increased)-3490-6-04-1757566399.zip

State.Author: Lexman6 - Lo2k
State.Description:
Changes the amount of fuel used on each take off of your ships.



FOMOD installer, first choose what "Fuel Costs" difficulty setting you are playing with (Discounted, Standard, Expensive). Then choose from the options I provide of 0%, 1%, 5%, 10%, 20%, 50%, or 100%.



Thought the ability to use more fuel would be fun for some peop
State.Name: Reduced Ship Launch Fuel Costs (Or Increased)
